title: BitOS 26.05.05
changes: Added full account management support in Settings.
Display name now updates instantly using Firebase updateProfile.
Email changes now require password reauthentication for improved security.
Password changes now require reauthentication and automatically sign users out.
Added secure account deletion with DELETE confirmation and Firestore data cleanup.
Account flows now use reauthenticateWithCredential to prevent recent-login errors.
Improved authentication error handling with friendlier user-facing messages.
Profile picture editing remains intentionally disabled.
